module-0-student-roster-project.label: Module 0 Student Roster Project
module-0-student-roster-project.summary: Build a simple student roster by extending one working query through a few clear beginner steps.

mp-1-preview-student-roster.title: Preview the roster columns
mp-1-preview-student-roster.prompt: Start the student roster by returning `id`, `name`, and `grade` from the `students` table.
mp-1-preview-student-roster.hint: Add the missing field in the SELECT list.

help.concept: This project step grows one working query into a more useful report.
help.hint_1: Keep `id` and `name`, then add `grade` before `FROM students`.
help.hint_2: Run the query and check that the result shows three columns in that order.

mp-1-preview-student-roster.starterCode:
-- Start the roster with id, name, and grade.
SELECT
  id,
  name
FROM students;

mp-2-add-city-to-roster.title: Add each student's city
mp-2-add-city-to-roster.prompt: Keep the working roster query and add the `city` column so the roster shows where each student is from.
mp-2-add-city-to-roster.hint: Extend the SELECT list instead of starting over.

help.concept: A progressive project keeps the working query and adds one improvement at a time.
help.hint_1: Keep `id`, `name`, and `grade` exactly as they are.
help.hint_2: Add `city` before `FROM students`, then rerun the query.

mp-2-add-city-to-roster.starterCode:
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  grade
FROM students;

-- Keep the roster fields above.
-- Add city before FROM.

mp-3-finish-student-roster.title: Finish the full roster view
mp-3-finish-student-roster.prompt: Keep the roster working and add `age` so the final query returns `id`, `name`, `grade`, `age`, and `city` from `students`.
mp-3-finish-student-roster.hint: Insert one more field into the SELECT list.

help.concept: The final step should preserve the earlier working query and add the last missing field.
help.hint_2: Add `age` between `grade` and `city`, then rerun the query.

mp-3-finish-student-roster.starterCode:
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  grade,
  city
FROM students;

-- Keep the roster fields above.
-- Add age between grade and city.

sketch_project_brief.title: Project brief
sketch_project_brief.bodyMarkdown:
You are building a simple student roster for a teammate who wants a quick classroom snapshot.

The goal is to keep one working query alive and improve it step by step. Each new step should begin from the working result of the previous step.

By the end of this mini-project, your roster will show the key student details in one clean results table.
